race.comment: PERRI LASS (9) was not far away first-up before struggling over 1700m at Ipswich last start where she was affected by the thumps. The move to the poly surface could spark improvement and she should be nearing peak fitness third run back. KRUMAC (8) had little luck when closing off into sixth at Ipswich last week and now gets a key rider change with Mark Du Plessis taking over. From the inside draw he gets every chance to turn the tables. NORWEGIAN JOY (3) resumes after a long absence but has trialled twice in preparation for this return. If he comes back anywhere near his previous ability, he can be competitive in this line-up. PRIVALOVA (4) makes her Queensland debut after showing promise in Victoria and is worth monitoring in betting. HALFACHANCE (1) strips fitter second-up and can improve sharply.
